sqlMap.sql:
a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
a.WRITER_DEPT_ID = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE a.APPR_USER_NAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #apprUserName#,'%')
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_NAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerName#,'%')
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerDeptName#,'%')
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.CHANGE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #startDate#
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.CHANGE_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #endDate#
a.APPR_STATUS = #type#
AND a.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY
START_DATE WRITER_NAME WRITER_DEPT_NAME APPR_STATUS APPR_USER_NAME APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_CNT DESC
#startPoint#, #endPoint#

a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
a.WRITER_DEPT_ID = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE a.APPR_USER_NAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #apprUserName#,'%')
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_NAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerName#,'%')
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #writerDeptName#,'%')
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.START_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') >= #startDate#
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.START_DATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d') <= #endDate#
a.APPR_STATUS = #type#
AND a.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY
START_DATE WRITER_NAME WRITER_DEPT_NAME TYPE_NAME APPR_STATUS APPR_USER_NAME APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_CNT DESC
#startPoint#, #endPoint#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute),12)), date_format(date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS START_DATE, IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12)), date_format(date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE B.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE C.DESCRIPTION END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME, A.ATTEND_TYPE, A.LATITUDE, A.LONGITUDE, A.WORK_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND ISDEL = 0) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON (C.CN = A.WRITER_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE
(
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
)
A.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND c.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
AND A.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endDate#) or (date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endDate#) or (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endDate#) )
UNION SELECT D.ATTITUDE_ID, D.COMPANY_ID, D.TENANT_ID, D.WRITER_ID, D.DEPT_ID, IF( date_add(D.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(date_add(D.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12)), date_format(date_add(D.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS START_DATE, IF( date_add(D.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(date_add(D.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12)), date_format(date_add(D.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS END_DATE, D.MODAPPL, D.REGION, D.MOBILE, D.BIZSUB, D.CONTENT, D.IP, D.DATE_TYPE, D.TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN E.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE E.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPE_NAME, E.IMG_PATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN F.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE F.DISPLAYNAME END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN F.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE F.DESCRIPTION END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME, D.ATTEND_TYPE, D.LATITUDE, D.LONGITUDE, D.WORK_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude D INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type E ON (D.TYPE_ID = E.TYPE_ID AND D.COMPANY_ID = E.COMPANY_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster F ON (F.CN = D.WRITER_ID AND D.COMPANY_ID = F.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND D.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER G ON (
#deptIdArr[]#
AND D.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND D.WRITER_ID = G.CN ) WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
D.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND D.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endDate#) or (date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endDate#) or (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endDate#) )
) AS H
ORDER BY H.START_DATE, H.TYPE_ID
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude ( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, DEPT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, REGION, MOBILE, BIZSUB, CONTENT, IP, DATE_TYPE, TYPE_ID, MODAPPL, ATTEND_TYPE
,LATITUDE, LONGITUDE
,WORK_STATUS
) VALUES ( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #deptId#, date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, #modappl#, #attendType#
,#latitude#, #longitude#
,#workStatus#
)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_STARTDATE, CHANGE_ENDDATE, CHANGE_REGION, CHANGE_MOBILE, CHANGE_BIZSUB, CHANGE_CONTENT, CHANGE_IP, CHANGE_DATE_TYPE, CHANGE_TYPE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE ) SELECT #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, b.displayname, b.displayname2, b.title, b.title2, #deptId#, b.DESCRIPTION, b.DESCRIPTION2, date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, a.type_name, a.type_name2, #adminId#, c.displayname, c.displayname2, #apprDate# FROM (select * from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) a , (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #writerId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) b , (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #adminId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_conf WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.change_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.appr_user_name2 ELSE a.appr_user_name END AS APPR_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.origin_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_name2 ELSE a.writer_name END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_dept_name2 ELSE a.writer_dept_name END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME, a.appl_cnt AS APPL_CNT, a.writer_id as WRITER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.appl_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as APPL_DATE FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offsetMin# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, WRITER_ID FROM tbl_attitude where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #ids#

SELECT a.attitude_id AS ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.change_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.appr_user_name2 ELSE a.appr_user_name END AS APPR_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.origin_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status AS APPR_STATUS, c.type_id AS TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN c.type_name2 ELSE c.type_name END AS TYPE_NAME, a.content AS CONTENT, a.writer_id AS WRITER_ID, a.writer_dept_id AS WRITER_DEPT_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_name2 ELSE a.writer_name END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_title2 ELSE a.writer_title END AS WRITER_TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_dept_name2 ELSE a.writer_dept_name END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and a.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
order by a.APPL_CNT DESC limit 1

SELECT SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, #endDate#, date_add(IFNULL(END_DATE, START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, #startDate#, date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(TYPE_ID) AS COUNT, TYPE_ID FROM tbl_attitude WHERE (
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND WRITER_ID NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03', 'A25') AND MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) or (END_DATE >= #startDate# and END_DATE < #endDate#) or (START_DATE < #startDate# and END_DATE >= #endDate#) ) GROUP BY TYPE_ID

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, ISSOLAR, ISREPEAT, ISREST, ISUSE, USECOMPANY, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYREPEAT FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE (USECOMPANY = 'ALL' or USECOMPANY = #companyId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND isuse = 1
AND isrest = 1
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#)t)
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MODAPPL FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = B.ATTITUDE_ID SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl#
,A.START_DATE = B.CHANGE_DATE ,A.TYPE_ID = "A02"
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
#ids[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.FORM_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.FORM_HTML2 ELSE A.FORM_HTML END AS FORM_HTML FROM tbl_attitude_form A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON A.FORM_ID = B.FORM_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, ORIGIN_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) VALUES( #attitudeId#, ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerTitle#, #writerTitle2#, #writerDeptId#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#changeDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#originDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), #delFlag#, #apprStatus#, #content#, #applDate# )

INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, CHANGE_DATE, ORIGIN_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) SELECT #attitudeId#, ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #adminId#, b.DISPLAYNAME, b.DISPLAYNAME2, b.TITLE, b.TITLE2, b.DEPARTMENT, b.DESCRIPTION, b.DESCRIPTION2, #adminId#, b.DISPLAYNAME, b.DISPLAYNAME2, #apprDate#, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#changeDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offsetMin# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#originDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offsetMin# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), "1", #content#, #applDate# FROM (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #adminId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) b
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET CONTENT = #content#, CHANGE_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(#changeDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), APPL_DATE = #applDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) AS START_DATE, date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE B.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE C.DESCRIPTION END AS DESCRIPTION, ifnull(D.ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, -1) as ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, ifnull( ( SELECT FUNCTIONTYPE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO E WHERE D.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = E.DOCID OR D.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = E.ORGDOCID LIMIT 1 ) , 0) AS DOC_APPR_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITER_ID = C.CN LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN D ON (A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = D.COMPANY_ID AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = D.ATTITUDE_ID) WHERE A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(#apprDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ,APPR_USER_ID = #userId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = #displayName# ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = #displayName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL , (SELECT displayname,displayname2 from tbl_usermaster where cn=#adminId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#) a SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(#apprDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ,APPR_USER_ID = #adminId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = a.displayname ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = a.displayname2 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL B ON A.ATTITUDE_ID = B.ATTITUDE_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID SET
A.START_DATE = B.CHANGE_DATE
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #ids#
AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND B.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND B.APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.TYPE_ID = #typeId# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( ATTITUDE_ID, MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT ) SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(MOD_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl_history WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]# ), COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE,
1
2 , CONTENT FROM tbl_attitude_modappl WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_attitude WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
UPDATE tbl_attitude SET TYPE_ID = #typeId#, REGION = #region#, MOBILE = #mobile#, BIZSUB = #bizSub#, CONTENT = #content#, DATE_TYPE = #dateType#, IP = #ipAddress#, START_DATE = date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), END_DATE = IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute))
,MODAPPL = #modappl#
,LATITUDE = #latitude# ,LONGITUDE = #longitude#
WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.APPR_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS APPR_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE A.APPR_USER_NAME END AS APPR_USER_NAME, A.APPR_STATUS, A.CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.ORIGIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS ORIGIN_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.CHANGE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE B.DESCRIPTION END AS DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.APPR_USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# ORDER BY A.APPR_DATE DESC, A.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_STARTDATE, CHANGE_ENDDATE, CHANGE_REGION, CHANGE_MOBILE, CHANGE_BIZSUB, CHANGE_CONTENT, CHANGE_IP, CHANGE_DATE_TYPE, CHANGE_TYPE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, ATTITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_STARTDATE, ORIGIN_ENDDATE, ORIGIN_CONTENT, ORIGIN_REGION, ORIGIN_MOBILE, ORIGIN_BIZSUB, ORIGIN_IP, ORIGIN_TYPE_ID, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME2, ORIGIN_DATE_TYPE, APPR_DATE ) VALUES ( #attVO.companyId#, #tenantId#, #attVO.writerId#, #userInfo.userName#, #userInfo.userName2#, #userInfo.title#, #userInfo.title2#, #attVO.deptId#, #userInfo.deptName#, #userInfo.deptName2#, IF(#startDate# = '', null, date_add(#startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IF(#endDate# = '', null, date_add(#endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), IFNULL(#region#, ''), IFNULL(#mobile#, ''), IFNULL(#bizSub#, ''), IFNULL(#content#, ''), IFNULL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, (select type_name from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #attVO.companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#), (select type_name2 from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #attVO.companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#), #adminId#, #adminInfo.userName#, #adminInfo.userName2#, #attitudeId#, date_add(#attVO.startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#attVO.endDate# = '', null, date_add(#attVO.endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), #attVO.content#, #attVO.region#, #attVO.mobile#, #attVO.bizSub#, #attVO.ip#, #attVO.typeId#, #attVO.typeName#, #attVO.typeName2#, #attVO.dateType#, #apprDate# )

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, ATTITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_STARTDATE, ORIGIN_ENDDATE, ORIGIN_CONTENT, ORIGIN_REGION, ORIGIN_MOBILE, ORIGIN_BIZSUB, ORIGIN_IP, ORIGIN_TYPE_ID, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME2, ORIGIN_DATE_TYPE, APPR_DATE ) VALUES ( #attVO.companyId#, #tenantId#, #attVO.writerId#, #userInfo.userName#, #userInfo.userName2#, #userInfo.title#, #userInfo.title2#, #attVO.deptId#, #userInfo.deptName#, #userInfo.deptName2#, #adminId#, #adminInfo.userName#, #adminInfo.userName2#, #attitudeId#, date_add(#attVO.startDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute), IF(#attVO.endDate# = '', null, date_add(#attVO.endDate#, INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)), #attVO.content#, #attVO.region#, #attVO.mobile#, #attVO.bizSub#, #attVO.ip#, #attVO.typeId#, #attVO.typeName#, #attVO.typeName2#, #attVO.dateType#, #apprDate# )

select.isEqual: select attitude_id from tbl_attitude where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and writer_id = #writerId# and type_id = #typeId# and start_date >= date_add(concat(#checkStartDate#, ' 00:00:00'), INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute) and start_date <= date_add(concat(#checkStartDate#, ' 23:59:59'), INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)
select.isNotEqual:
select count(*) from tbl_attitude where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and writer_id = #writerId#
#typeIdArr[]#
and start_date >= date_add(concat(#checkStartDate#, ' 00:00:00'), INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute) and start_date <= date_add(concat(#checkStartDate#, ' 23:59:59'), INTERVAL -#offsetMin# minute)

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.cn = B.cn and A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A

SELECT cn, displayName, type, JOBID, ROLEID FROM (SELECT cn, department as displayName, 'USER' as type, DESCRIPTION, '' AS JOBID, '' AS ROLEID FROM TBL_USERMASTER A
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, 'ADDJOB' as type, DESCRIPTION, A.JOBID AS JOBID, A.ROLEID AS ROLEID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.cn = B.cn AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MOBILE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
MAIL LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_SEARCHPARAM#, '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY DESCRIPTION LIMIT #startRowForMySQL#, #count#

SELECT appr_status as APPR_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude_modappl where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
order by APPL_CNT DESC limit 1

SELECT IFNULL((SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, #endDate#, date_add(IFNULL(END_DATE, START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, #startDate#, date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + SUM( CASE WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END ) ), 0) AS ANNUAL_COUNT, MONTH(#startDate#) AS MONTH FROM tbl_attitude WHERE WRITER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID IN ('A11', 'A12', 'A13') AND MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE >= #startDate# and START_DATE <= #endDate#) or (END_DATE >= #startDate# and END_DATE < #endDate#) or (START_DATE < #startDate# and END_DATE >= #endDate#) )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual_canappl( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) VALUES( #attitudeId#, ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM tbl_attitude_annual_canappl a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerTitle#, #writerTitle2#, #writerDeptId#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #apprStatus#, #content#, #applDate# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, CAST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, JOIN_DATE, NOW()) AS CHAR(4)) AS workingMonthCnt, DATE_FORMAT(JOIN_DATE, '%X-%c-%d') AS joinDate, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL WHERE 1 = 1
AND JOIN_DATE LIKE CONCAT('%-%-',#yesterday#,'%')
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND JOIN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND JOIN_DATE <= NOW()

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,START_DATE,END_DATE) + 1, 1)), 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE (TYPE_ID != 'A02' AND TYPE_ID != 'A17') AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND START_DATE >= #joinDate#
AND START_DATE <= DATE_ADD(#oneDayAgo#, interval - 540 minute) AND START_DATE > DATE_ADD(#oneMonthAgo#, interval -540 minute)
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL SET
ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = #holidayCnt#
MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT = MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + #holidayCnt#
- MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT
ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = #holidayCnt#, MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT = #holidayCnt#
WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.TENANT_ID AS tenantId, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS companyId FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF B ON A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,START_DATE,END_DATE) + 1, 1)), 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE TYPE_ID = 'A17' AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND START_DATE >= DATE_ADD(#oneMonthAgo#, interval - 540 minute) AND START_DATE < DATE_ADD(#oneDayAgo#, interval - 540 minute) AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY,START_DATE,END_DATE) + 1, 1)), 0) AS cnt FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE TYPE_ID IN ('A11','A12','A13','A21') AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND START_DATE >= #joinDate# AND START_DATE < #today# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND MODAPPL NOT IN ('1','5') GROUP BY TYPE_ID
SELECT MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT appr_status as APPR_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude_annual_canappl where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
order by APPL_CNT DESC limit 1
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#)t)
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_annual_canappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

SELECT a.attitude_id as ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE a.APPR_USER_NAME END AS APPR_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status as APPR_STATUS, c.type_id AS TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN c.type_name2 ELSE c.type_name END AS TYPE_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_NAME END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME, a.appl_cnt AS APPL_CNT, a.writer_id as WRITER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(a.appl_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') as APPL_DATE FROM tbl_attitude_annual_canappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

SELECT a.attitude_id AS ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.appr_user_name2 ELSE a.appr_user_name END AS APPR_USER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(b.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status AS APPR_STATUS, c.type_id AS TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN c.type_name2 ELSE c.type_name END AS TYPE_NAME, a.content AS CONTENT, a.writer_id AS WRITER_ID, a.writer_dept_id AS WRITER_DEPT_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_name2 ELSE a.writer_name END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_title2 ELSE a.writer_title END AS WRITER_TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_dept_name2 ELSE a.writer_dept_name END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM tbl_attitude_annual_canappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and a.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
order by a.APPL_CNT DESC limit 1
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(#apprDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ,APPR_USER_ID = #userId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = #displayName# ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = #displayName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.APPR_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS APPR_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE A.APPR_USER_NAME END AS APPR_USER_NAME, A.APPR_STATUS, A.CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS ORIGIN_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(C.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE B.DESCRIPTION END AS DESCRIPTION, C.TYPE_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.APPR_USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# inner join tbl_attitude C on A.ATTITUDE_ID = C.ATTITUDE_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID ORDER BY A.APPR_DATE DESC, A.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_apr_conn (attitude_id, user_Id, annual_doc_id, annual_appr_status, company_Id, tenant_Id) VALUES(#attitudeId#, #userId#, #docId#, #aprStatus#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_attitude_apr_conn SET annual_appr_status = #aprStatus# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND annual_doc_id = #docId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT attitude_Id FROM tbl_attitude_apr_conn WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND annual_doc_id = #docId#

SELECT B.DOCID AS DOCID, B.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, B.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, B.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, B.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, B.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN AS APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.APRMEMBERNAME2 ELSE B.APRMEMBERNAME END AS APRMEMBERNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 ELSE B.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE END AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, B.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 ELSE B.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME END AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, B.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH AS APRMEMBERLDAPPATH FROM tbl_attitude_apr_conn A INNER JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANYID AND A.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = B.DOCID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#

SELECT IF( date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate#, CONCAT(substr(#startDate#,1,11), substr(date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute),12)), date_format(date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS startDate, IF( date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) > #endDate#, CONCAT(substr(#endDate#,1,11), substr(date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12)), date_format(date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS endDate FROM tbl_attitude WHERE WRITER_ID = #writerId# AND (TYPE_ID = 'A17' OR DATE_TYPE = '4') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endDate#) or (date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endDate#) or (date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startDate# and date_add(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endDate#) )

SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID AS ATTITUDEID, IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #v_OFFSETMIN# minute) < #v_PSTARTDATE#, CONCAT(substr(#v_PSTARTDATE#,1,11), substr(date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #v_OFFSETMIN# minute),12)), date_format(date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL #v_OFFSETMIN# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS STARTDATE, IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #v_OFFSETMIN# minute) > #v_PENDDATE#, CONCAT(substr(#v_PENDDATE#,1,11), substr(date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #v_OFFSETMIN# minute), 12)), date_format(date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL #v_OFFSETMIN# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ) AS ENDDATE, A.TYPE_ID AS TYPEID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE B.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPENAME, B.IMG_PATH AS IMGPATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS WRITERNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE C.DESCRIPTION END AS WRITERDEPTNAME FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON (C.CN = A.WRITER_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.MODAPPL <> '5'
AND A.TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A02', 'A03', 'A25') AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND c.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
A.DEPT_ID = #v_DEPTID#
A.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANYID#
AND ( (START_DATE >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and START_DATE <= #v_PENDDATE#) or (END_DATE >= #v_PSTARTDATE# and END_DATE < #v_PENDDATE#) or (START_DATE < #v_PSTARTDATE# and END_DATE >= #v_PENDDATE#) )
AND B.TYPE_NAME like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%')
AND A.REGION like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%')
AND ( B.TYPE_NAME like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') OR A.REGION like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') )
AND A.WRITER_ID IN
#v_INDILIST[]#

SELECT date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE WRITER_ID = #writerId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID IN ('A01', 'A02') AND date_add(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) LIKE CONCAT(#startDate2#, '%')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE SET WORK_STATUS = #workStatus# WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, if(A.type_id='A25', DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL cast(substring(d.TIMEZONE, 5) as unsigned) hour), INTERVAL -1 day), DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL cast(substring(d.TIMEZONE, 5) as unsigned) hour)) as startdate, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL cast(substring(d.TIMEZONE, 5) as unsigned) hour), 12) AS starttime, A.modappl, A.type_id AS typeid, B.type_name AS typename, A.work_status AS workstatus FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id JOIN tbl_userlocalinfo D ON A.writer_id = D.USERID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND A.type_id IN ("A01","A02","A03","A08","A25") AND A.modappl <> 5 ORDER BY date_format(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d') DESC, writerid, starttime DESC
